---
name: ponytail-gain
description: >
  Measure the gain from lazy improvements. Count less code, less complexity,
  and less maintenance burden after a ponytail decision.
---

# Ponytail Gain

Report the practical win from taking the shortest path.

## Measure

- Lines removed
- Files removed
- Dependencies avoided
- New concepts avoided
- Maintenance risk reduced

## Output

Short scoreboard. Favor before/after numbers if available.

Example:

`-120 LOC, -1 dependency, -2 files. No new abstraction. Less to page on.`
